REPLY BRIEF IN SUPPORT OF MOTION TO COMPEL DISCOVERY AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS FILED BY DEFENDANT MCKNABB, JEANIE
MINI MINUTES FOR NOV-05-2014 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 501

UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANT JEANIE MCKNABB'S MOTION TO COMPEL DISCOVERY AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF SHALL PAY FEES AND SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,572.50 BY NOVEMBER 12, 2014. PLAINTIFF SHALL PROVIDE DISCOVERY RESPONSES BY NOVEMBER 12, 2014. ORDER IS SIGNED. JUDGE: LYNN O'MALLEY-TAYLOR, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (D501)
COURT TRIAL SET FOR FEB-23-2015 CONTINUED TO FEB-25-2015 AT 9:30 AM IN 206. PER JUDGE STEWARD THE CASE HAS BEEN SENT BACK TO DEPT. 206. JUDGE: R.ULMER, CLERK: J.MURPHY. MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 15054103)

Off Calendar Nov-05-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Kevin Greenquist, Esq. of Zanghi Torres Arshawsky LLP (415-977-0444 ext 34)
No other appearance on the matter.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling with additions as follows: DEFENDANT JEANIE MCKNABB's Motion To Compel Discovery And Request For Sanctions is GRANTED. Plaintiff shall pay fees and sanctions in the amount of $1,572.50 by November 12, 2014. Plaintiff shall provide discovery responses by November 12, 2014. Order is signed. Judge: Lynn O'Malley-Taylor, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
